text: cooldown action type should also include option to press.
description:
Because usually in main agent thread are options like: 
1. retry
2. switch to different model. 

Watchdog should choose retry (cooldown and retry)

status.comment: Implemented 'press' option for cooldown action in WatchdogService. The prompt now instructs the model to use it for retry prompts, and executeAction schedules the keypress after the cooldown duration.
